product: Power BI Databricks connector supports M2M OAuth
tagline: You can now authenticate into Power BI Desktop using Machine to Machine (M2M) OAuth credentials.
what_it_does: You can now authenticate into Power BI Desktop using Machine to Machine (M2M) OAuth credentials. If you are currently using personal access tokens on behalf of service principals, Databricks recommends switching to the new Client credentials authentication option. This page describes how to set up a service principal in Databricks if you want to enable machine to machine (M2M) OAuth authentication with Power BI.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: You can now authenticate into Power BI Desktop using Machine to Machine (M2M) OAuth credentials.
